summary:
Updated rebuild plan for POV pipeline. Now includes:
- Q1: Level Anchor injected by code (not AI), removing the #1 source of conflicts
- Q2: Closing type system explained — 4 rotation types for outline metadata, writer just follows the assigned type
- Q3: Full model tier map — 3 steps hardcoded flash (validate, chapter_plan, audit), rest user-selected via UI
- Q4: Anti-duplication architecture with Rule Registry pattern and ownership table

All 7 components updated. Ready for execution after user approval.
